zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Daours於1091年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆道爾斯時，她的父親Jean Ier de Daours27歲，母親Louise de Corbie19歲。她和Guermond de Picquigny I至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1144年在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Daours于1091年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆道爾斯时，她的父亲Jean Ier de Daours27岁，母亲Louise de Corbie19岁。她和Guermond de Picquigny I至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1144年在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Daours was born in 1091, in Daours, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Jean Ier de Daours, was 27 and her mother, Louise de Corbie, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Guermond de Picquigny I. She died in 1144, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Daours est née en 1091, à Daours, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean Ier de Daours, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Louise de Corbie, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Guermond de Picquigny I. Elle est décédée en 1144, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Daours 1091 in Daours, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean Ier de Daours 27 und ihre Mutter Louise de Corbie 19. Sie hatte mit Guermond de Picquigny I mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1144 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Daours è nata il nel 1091 nel Daours, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jean Ier de Daours, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Louise de Corbie, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Guermond de Picquigny I. Morì nel 1144, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Daoursが1091年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメダオウルズで生まれた時，父Jean Ier de Daoursは27歳，母Louise de Corbieは19歳であった。彼女はGuermond de Picquigny Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1144年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Daours(이)가 1091년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 다우르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean Ier de Daours(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Louise de Corbie(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Guermond de Picquigny I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Daours nasceu em 1091, em Daours, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean Ier de Daours, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Louise de Corbie, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Guermond de Picquigny I. Ela faleceu em 1144, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Daours родилась в 1091 г. в местности даоурс, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean Ier de Daours было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise de Corbie, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Guermond de Picquigny I. Она умерла в 1144 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Daours nació en 1091, en Daours, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier de Daours, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Louise de Corbie, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Guermond de Picquigny I. Murió en 1144, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
